title: Phase 4C: Order module - service and API routes
description: Build the order service with CRUD, state machine transitions, credit hold checking, and readiness rollup. Build all order API routes including items management and state transitions.
steps: Implement state machine integration for order transitions
Implement credit hold check on order creation/confirmation
Implement readiness rollup (all items ready = order ready)
Create src/app/api/orders/route.ts with GET (list/search) and POST (create)
Create src/app/api/orders/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT, DELETE
Create src/app/api/orders/[id]/items/route.ts with order item CRUD
Integrate audit events on all state transitions
